result.summary: Zoom exposes a developer platform with OAuth 2.0 authorization and token endpoints, but the corpus does not confirm any specific public API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI surface beyond the platform entry pages.

zoom_oauth_client.label: Zoom OAuth app credentials
zoom_oauth_client.setup: Create an OAuth app from the [Zoom Developer Platform](https://developers.zoom.us/) and use the app's client credentials with Zoom OAuth. The detected endpoints are `https://zoom.us/oauth/authorize` for authorization and `https://zoom.us/oauth/token` for token exchange/refresh.

client_id.description: OAuth client ID for your Zoom app.

client_secret.description: OAuth client secret for your Zoom app.
